// Note: Worker production config. ASPNETCORE_ENVIRONMENT=Production selects this file. Real values should live in environment variables or a sealed file outside source control; this file is checked in as a structural template. ConfigDb is the same SQL Server the Web app uses — Hangfire's job storage tables live in the same database under the HangFire schema.

Admins.// Note: Email allowlist for the /hangfire dashboard. Same format the Web app uses. Empty = nobody can access (fail-closed in non-Development).

Scheduler.// PollIntervalSeconds: How often SchedulerSyncService reconciles RPT_report_schedules with Hangfire's recurring-job registry. Minimum 15s. Default 60s. Lower = faster propagation of schedule edits, higher = less DB chatter.
Scheduler.// RestartCatchUpMinutes: After a worker restart, manually trigger any active schedule whose cron fired within this many minutes AND whose last_run_at hasn't caught up to that fire. Default 60. Set to 0 to disable catch-up (a missed fire is silently skipped — safest against duplicate emails). Clamped to [0, 1440]. Only consulted on the FIRST sync after process boot.

Smtp.// Note: Reserved for the real EmailService implementation. The current stub logs the message but doesn't send. When the Graph/SMTP impl lands, fill in Host/Port/User/Password (or Graph TenantId/ClientId/ClientSecret) here.
